summary: Car customisation website where users can customize cars visually.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dark automotive showroom hero banner with dramatic spotlight lighting on a sleek modern sports car silhouette, metallic silver and amber accent tones, wide cinematic crop (car-showroom-hero.dim_1920x600.png)

existing_features.title: Build a car customisation UI with a live preview panel and a controls sidebar. The preview panel should display the customised car rendered in 3D using Three.js/React Three Fiber. The controls sidebar should allow the user to select: car model (at least 3 options), body color (color picker), wheel style (at least 3 options), and interior color (color picker).
Add a 'Save Configuration' button that persists the current customisation state to the backend. Add a 'Load My Configuration' button that retrieves and applies the user's last saved configuration.

Apply a sleek, dark automotive showroom visual theme throughout the site. Use a dark charcoal and matte black background palette with metallic silver and amber accent colors. Use bold, modern sans-serif typography. The layout should feel like a premium car configurator — minimal chrome, high contrast UI, spotlight-style lighting on the 3D model preview. Enforce this theme consistently across all pages and components.
Render the generated hero/branding image (car-showroom-hero.dim_1920x600.png) as a static asset in the header or landing section of the website.

new_feature_requests.summary: Car customisation website with visual car customization options

Create a backend actor that stores car customisation configurations, including fields for: car model, body color, wheel style, interior color, and any additional accessories. Expose functions to save, retrieve, and list configurations by user.
